backends/opengl/common

Types

AABounds = object
  min*, max*: Vec3
Source   Edit   
AlphaMode = enum
  OpaqueAlphaMode, MaskAlphaMode, BlendAlphaMode

AnimationChannel = object
  target*: Node
  path*: AnimPath
  interpolation*: AnimInterpolation
  times*: seq[float32]
  valuesVec3*: seq[Vec3]
  inTangentsVec3*: seq[Vec3]
  outTangentsVec3*: seq[Vec3]
  valuesQuat*: seq[Quat]
  inTangentsQuat*: seq[Quat]
  outTangentsQuat*: seq[Quat]
  valuesFloat*: seq[float32]
  inTangentsFloat*: seq[float32]
  outTangentsFloat*: seq[float32]
  valuesWeights*: seq[seq[float32]]
  inTangentsWeights*: seq[seq[float32]]
  outTangentsWeights*: seq[seq[float32]]
Source   Edit   
AnimationClip = object
  name*: string
  duration*: float32
  channels*: seq[AnimationChannel]

  aiStep, aiLinear, aiCubicSpline

  AnimTranslation, AnimRotation, AnimScale, AnimVisibility, AnimWeights

  center*: Vec3
  radius*: float

  center*: Vec3
  size*: Vec3

  name*: string
  kind*: CameraKind
  perspective*: PerspectiveCamera
  orthographic*: OrthographicCamera

CameraKind = enum
  PerspectiveLens, OrthographicLens

ComponentType = enum
  ByteComponent = 5120, UnsignedByteComponent = 5121, ShortComponent = 5122,
  UnsignedShortComponent = 5123, UnsignedIntComponent = 5125,
  FloatComponent = 5126

  dvLit, dvUnlit, dvNormals, dvAoBake, dvMetallic, dvSpecular

GltfError = object of CatchableError

  path*: string
  root*: Node
  scenes*: seq[Scene]
  scene*: int
  cameras*: seq[Camera]
  skins*: seq[Skin]
  unsupportedUsedExtensions*: seq[string]
  sceneVersion*: uint64
  data*: GltfFileData

JointIds = array[4, uint16]
Source   Edit   
Material = ref object
  name*: string
  baseColor*: Image
  baseColorKtx2*: string
  baseColorName*: string
  baseColorTransform*: TextureTransform
  baseColorSampler*: TextureSampler
  baseColorFactor*: Color
  metallicRoughness*: Image
  metallicRoughnessKtx2*: string
  metallicRoughnessName*: string
  metallicRoughnessTransform*: TextureTransform
  metallicRoughnessSampler*: TextureSampler
  metallicFactor*: float32
  roughnessFactor*: float32
  normal*: Image
  normalKtx2*: string
  normalName*: string
  normalTransform*: TextureTransform
  normalSampler*: TextureSampler
  hasNormalTexture*: bool
  normalScale*: float32
  occlusion*: Image
  occlusionKtx2*: string
  occlusionName*: string
  occlusionTransform*: TextureTransform
  occlusionSampler*: TextureSampler
  occlusionStrength*: float32
  emissive*: Image
  emissiveKtx2*: string
  emissiveName*: string
  emissiveTransform*: TextureTransform
  emissiveSampler*: TextureSampler
  emissiveFactor*: Color
  alphaMode*: AlphaMode
  alphaCutoff*: float32
  doubleSided*: bool
  transmissionFactor*: float32
  materialVersion*: uint64
  data*: MaterialData

  name*: string
  primitives*: seq[Primitive]
  targetNames*: seq[string]

  name*: string
  visible*: bool
  pos*: Vec3

  baseRot*: Quat

  animTime*: float32
  mesh*: Mesh
  morphWeights*: seq[float32]
  baseMorphWeights*: seq[float32]
  skin*: Skin
  camera*: Camera
  nodes*: seq[Node]

  xmag*: float32
  ymag*: float32

  zfar*: float32

  aspectRatio*: float32

  zfar*: float32

Primitive = ref object
  points*: seq[Vec3]
  basePoints*: seq[Vec3]
  uvs*: seq[Vec2]
  uvs1*: seq[Vec2]
  normals*: seq[Vec3]
  baseNormals*: seq[Vec3]
  tangents*: seq[Vec4]
  baseTangents*: seq[Vec4]
  colors*: seq[ColorRGBX]
  jointIds*: seq[JointIds]
  jointWeights*: seq[Vec4]
  indices16*: seq[uint16]
  indices32*: seq[uint32]
  morphTargets*: seq[MorphTarget]
  material*: Material
  mode*: PrimitiveMode
  geometryVersion*: uint64
  data*: PrimitiveData
Source   Edit   
PrimitiveMode = enum
  PointsMode = 0, LinesMode = 1, LineLoopMode = 2, LineStripMode = 3,
  TrianglesMode = 4, TriangleStripMode = 5, TriangleFanMode = 6

  size*: IVec2
  clearColor*: Color
  transform*: Mat4

  proj*: Mat4
  tint*: Color
  useTrs*: bool

  sunLightDirection*: Vec3

  rimLightDirection*: Vec3
  rimLightColor*: Color
  debugView*: DebugView
  cameraPosition*: Vec3
  useShadows*: bool
  drawSkybox*: bool
  skyboxLod*: float32
  vsync*: bool

  name*: string
  nodes*: seq[Node]

TextureMagFilter = enum
  NearestMagFilter = 9728, LinearMagFilter = 9729

TextureMinFilter = enum
  NearestMinFilter = 9728, LinearMinFilter = 9729,
  NearestMipmapNearestMinFilter = 9984, LinearMipmapNearestMinFilter = 9985,
  NearestMipmapLinearMinFilter = 9986, LinearMipmapLinearMinFilter = 9987

TextureSampler = object
  magFilter*: TextureMagFilter
  minFilter*: TextureMinFilter
  wrapS*: TextureWrap
  wrapT*: TextureWrap

TextureTransform = object
  texCoord*: int
  offset*: Vec2
  scale*: Vec2
  rotation*: float32

TextureWrap = enum
  ClampToEdgeWrap = 33071, MirroredRepeatWrap = 33648, RepeatWrap = 10497
